description.value: **Benefit:** You can alter a spell with an area of effect and a duration of instantaneous to become an apocalyptic spell. When you cast the spell, the area affected by the spellâs instantaneous effect becomes ruined and devastated in appearance. All surfaces in the area are treated as difficult terrain, and Climb, Fly, and Swim checks attempted in the area take a penalty equal to the spellâs original spell level. The difficult terrain and skill penalties last for a number of rounds equal to the spellâs original spell level. An apocalyptic spell gains the evil descriptor. An apocalyptic spell uses a spell slot 1 level higher than the spellâs normal spell level. Spells with the good descriptor canât be apocalyptic spells.
